engineering-backend-architect.name: Backend Architect
engineering-backend-architect.description: Designs databases, APIs, cloud infrastructure, and scalable systems that hold everything up.

engineering-code-reviewer.description: Reviews code like a mentor, not a gatekeeper — every comment teaches something.

engineering-devops-automator.description: Automates infrastructure so your team ships faster and sleeps better.

engineering-security-engineer.name: Security Engineer
engineering-security-engineer.description: Vigilant, methodical, adversarial-minded, and pragmatic about application security.

product-senior-project-manager.description: Converts specs into structured, implementable development tasks with realistic scope.

engineering-software-architect.name: Software Architect
engineering-software-architect.description: Designs systems that survive the team that built them — every decision has a trade-off.

product-sprint-prioritizer.name: Sprint Prioritizer
product-sprint-prioritizer.description: Maximizes sprint value through data-driven prioritization and ruthless focus.
